term: Hold Anything Too Close to Your Heart
pronunciation: /hoʊld ˈɛniθɪŋ tu kloʊs tə jʊr hɑrt/
englishDefinitions: to care too deeply about something so that criticism or loss hurts you a lot
persianTranslation: بیش از حد به چیزی وابسته بودن
بیش از اندازه احساساتی شدن نسبت به چیزی
examples: Try not to hold the criticism too close to your heart.
He holds every comment too close to his heart and gets upset easily.
If you hold failure too close to your heart, it can stop you from trying again.
